description: Unified, source-agnostic longitudinal schema for women's hormonal-health signals. Harmonizes per-subject daily observations from heterogeneous sources (mcPHASES, NHANES) into a common shape so downstream symptom-to-cycle-phase insights are reproducible and source-independent. This is the reusable Foundation-Value artifact underlying the HormOS Layer-03 application.
license: CC-BY-4.0 (schema + derived artifacts). Upstream raw data remains under PhysioNet / CDC terms.
grain: One row = one (subject_id, observation_date) pair. Longitudinal per subject.

conventions.date_format: ISO-8601 (YYYY-MM-DD). May be a relative day index when absolute dates are unavailable/de-identified.
conventions.scales: Symptom severity uses an integer 0-3 ordinal scale (0=none, 1=mild, 2=moderate, 3=severe) to harmonize differing source encodings.
conventions.units: SI where possible; unit recorded per numeric field below.

subject.description: One row per subject. De-identified demographics + provenance.

subject_id.description: Stable de-identified id. Namespaced by source, e.g. 'mcphases:0007', 'nhanes:83732'.

reproductive_notes.description: Free-text/coded reproductive context (e.g. contraceptive use), de-identified.

daily_observation.description: Longitudinal daily record. Sparse: any field may be null when a source does not measure it.

observation_date.description: ISO date or relative day index.

cycle_day.description: Day within menstrual cycle (1 = first day of menses).

cycle_phase.description: Derived phase label. Derivation rules documented in docs/benchmark-methodology.md.

glucose_mean.description: Mean CGM glucose for the day (mcPHASES).
